name: ibkr
description: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) integration for Claude Code and MCP clients: agentic portfolio analysis, trading research, account/positions, snapshot + streaming quotes, official calendars, option chains, daily history, market scans, sizing, broad-market stress lifecycle, portfolio-aware canary stress lifecycle, and preview-only stock/ETF order drafts via the local ibkr CLI. The current bundled tool surface cannot place, modify, cancel, or transmit broker orders.
